title: Building with Anthropic's Fable 5 LIVE - Is It Really Worth the Hype?
summary: Cole Medin conducts a live stream evaluating Anthropic's Fable 5 model against Claude Opus 4.8. The stream tests whether Fable 5 justifies its 2x price premium and the hype surrounding it as Anthropic's most capable shipped model.
writeup: Cole Medin runs a live stream that evaluates Anthropic's Fable 5 model, billed as the company's most capable shipped model, against Claude Opus 4.8. The build session tests whether Fable 5 justifies the surrounding hype and its 2x price premium over the comparison model. The central question is capability versus cost: whether the added performance warrants paying double.
